name: win64c-api-set-nonlocale-support-spine

tooling_added.change: Qword reads now annotate RVA-backed import hint/name records. This makes import thunk cells such as FlsGetValue, FlsSetValue, FlsAlloc, FlsFree, HeapAlloc, and HeapFree self-describing instead of opaque non-image values.

dispatch_findings.finding: This qword points to 0x1407F4450 and is the indirect-call target used by the AppPolicy, WinRT, SystemFunction036, callback-slot, and CorExitProcess paths.
The shim is a single JMP through [0x140803060]. The adjacent qword at 0x140803060 points to 0x1407F4430, so guarded calls go through a two-level dispatch chain.

fls_context_findings.label: FlsGetValue thunk
fls_context_findings.finding: Thin import thunk to IAT cell 0x140802660, now annotated as KERNEL32!FlsGetValue by pe-read-qwords import-name previews.

fls_context_findings.label: FlsSetValue thunk
fls_context_findings.finding: Thin import thunk to IAT cell 0x140802658, annotated as KERNEL32!FlsSetValue.

fls_context_findings.label: FlsAlloc thunk
fls_context_findings.finding: Thin import thunk to IAT cell 0x140802668, annotated as KERNEL32!FlsAlloc.

fls_context_findings.label: FlsFree thunk
fls_context_findings.finding: Thin import thunk to IAT cell 0x140802650, annotated as KERNEL32!FlsFree.

fls_context_findings.label: fls_context_init
fls_context_findings.finding: Calls FlsAlloc with callback 0x1407DB3CC, stores the returned index at 0x140C364E8, and verifies that 0x1407DB6C4 can produce a context. If no context is produced it calls 0x1407DB888 to free the index and returns false.

fls_context_findings.label: fls_context_shutdown
fls_context_findings.finding: Reads the FLS index at 0x140C364E8, calls FlsFree when the index is not -1, then marks the index storage all-ones via an OR near 0x140C364E8.

fls_context_findings.label: require_fls_context
fls_context_findings.finding: Preserves GetLastError, retrieves the per-thread context through FlsGetValue, allocates a 0x3C8-byte context through 0x1407DCBC4 when missing, publishes it with FlsSetValue, restores LastError, and failfasts through 0x1407C45DC if no context exists.

fls_context_findings.label: get_or_create_fls_context_nullable
fls_context_findings.finding: Same FLS get/allocate/publish shape as 0x1407DB54C, but it returns null rather than taking the final failfast path when context creation fails.

allocator_findings.label: heap_calloc_like
allocator_findings.finding: Performs multiplication/overflow checks, uses heap handle 0x140C572C0, calls HeapAlloc(heap, 8, size), and writes errno-style 0x0C through 0x1407CD144 when allocation fails.

allocator_findings.label: heap_free_with_errno_preserve
allocator_findings.finding: Calls HeapFree(heap, 0, pointer). If HeapFree fails, it captures GetLastError, converts it through 0x1407CD070, and writes the converted errno through 0x1407CD144.

callback_slot_findings.label: encoded_callback_slot_writer
callback_slot_findings.finding: Compares 0x140C56A08 against cookie 0x140C361A8, then encodes the incoming pointer with the cookie rotation/XOR scheme and stores it at 0x140C56A08. A cookie mismatch calls 0x1407D3308 and reaches an INT3 path.

callback_slot_findings.label: encoded_callback_slot_consumer
callback_slot_findings.finding: Gates one-time initialization with 0x140C56A04 and 0x140C56A0F. If 0x140C56A08 is not equal to the cookie sentinel, it decodes the slot with cookie 0x140C361A8 and guard-dispatches the decoded callback via 0x140803068.

callback_slot_findings.label: fls_context_callback_bridge
callback_slot_findings.finding: Calls require_fls_context, loads [context+0x18], and guard-dispatches it through 0x140803068 when present before entering the shared failfast path.

exit_bridge_findings.label: process_exit_bridge
exit_bridge_findings.finding: Validates the current module image through GetModuleHandleW(NULL) and PE header checks, calls 0x1407D83A0 when load-config conditions are satisfied, then runs local exit callback tables through 0x1407D817C and a hard-exit fallback through 0x1407D8348.

exit_bridge_findings.label: CorExitProcess_bridge_and_slot_reset
exit_bridge_findings.finding: Uses GetModuleHandleExW on mscoree.dll, resolves CorExitProcess with GetProcAddress, guard-dispatches CorExitProcess(exit_code) when present, frees the module handle, and has a sibling entry at 0x1407D8410 that writes RCX directly into 0x140C56A08.

exit_bridge_findings.label: hard_exit_fallback
exit_bridge_findings.finding: Calls a local predicate at 0x1407D837C, optionally invokes TerminateProcess(GetCurrentProcess(), exit_code), then calls 0x1407D83A0 and ExitProcess(exit_code).

next_steps: Use the FLS context shape to annotate [context+0x18], [context+0x20], [context+0x3C0], and related lifecycle fields.
Follow 0x1407D9184 and 0x1407D94BC to identify the callback tables reached by the process-exit bridge.
Apply the RVA import-name qword annotations to other import-thunk clusters before manual naming.
